steps.title: Set up the x-intercept equation
steps.content:
The $x$-intercept occurs when $y = 0$. Since $y = f(x) + 6$, we need:
$$f(x) + 6 = 0$$ which means $$f(x) = -6$$

steps.title: Substitute the function definition and simplify
Solve for x
steps.content:
Divide both sides by $3d$ (assuming $d \neq 0$):
$$26x + 27 = \frac{-24}{3d} = \frac{-8}{d}$$$$26x = \frac{-8}{d} - 27 = \frac{-8 - 27d}{d}$$$$x = \frac{-8 - 27d}{26d}$$
Multiply numerator and denominator by 3 to match the answer choice form:
$$x = \frac{3(-8 - 27d)}{3(26d)} = \frac{-24 - 81d}{78d} = \frac{-81d - 24}{78d}$$
That matches choice B — B is correct.
